title: Support structs and struct-type arrays in constant functions

features.name: struct type definition with integer members
features.description: Code should include a struct type definition with integer members

features.name: array typedef with struct element type
features.description: Code should include a typedef array whose element type is a struct

features.name: constant function returning array type
features.description: Code should include a function that returns an array type and is used in constant evaluation

features.name: localparam assigned from constant function returning array
features.description: Code should include a localparam assigned from a function call that returns an array type

features.name: struct member assignment in function returning array
features.description: Code should include struct member assignments within a loop inside a function that returns an array type
